patch.value: Promote schema, config, profile, and init primitives to the public SDK: full workspace customization programmatically

Typed SDK functions for runtime-schema management (types/statuses/fields/presets), settings read/write with validation, profile list/show/apply/lint, and workspace init/scaffold — completing the universal-customization story. Duplicate check: profile-presets/plan are partially exported already; this item completes and stabilizes the domain surface.

SDK exports typed schema/config/profile/init primitives with the same validation + never-block errors as the CLI; corresponding commands consume only these primitives; docstrings + linked tests + SDK reference docs; zero behavior change

author: codex-agent

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Implementation start: bundled with pm-zwpp, pm-oxrw, pm-m4iu, pm-cbwg, pm-w89s, and pm-usfg. Live duplicate/context check found no closed schema/config/profile SDK primitive completion; prior read/lifecycle/package primitives remain separate shipped or in-progress domains.

message: Start wide SDK customization primitive bundle

author: claude-code-agent

value.note: SDK runtime exposes init/config/schema/profile customization primitives
SDK barrel exports customization primitive contracts

message: Link SDK customization primitive implementation evidence

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Evidence: post-review docs/API cleanup keeps package authors on the correct context-management primitive shapes: linked file/doc adds use string arrays and top-level note, while SchemaResult documents the generic schema customization result union. Verified through docs gate, typecheck, focused SDK tests, and packed installed SDK proof.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Review follow-up evidence: the generic SDK schema() return type now explicitly includes all concrete inspect results as well as schema mutation results, preserving compile-time safety for customization primitive consumers. Focused SDK test and full coverage passed.
